utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (provided), travel_dates (provided), transportation (only details of flight class/airline type, no costs—so not fully specified), accommodation (name and stay confirmation, no costs—so not fully specified), activities (listed and confirmed, but no costs—so not fully specified), additional_services (null—counts as included if considered 'any extra services', but there are none; format expects costs if any, so null is acceptable), total_budget (has figures, but not a complete cost breakdown by component; it's a lump sum with discount—this does not meet 'complete cost breakdown'). Therefore, fully specified items: destination (yes), travel_dates (yes), additional_services (acceptable as null), others fail due to missing costs or breakdown. That yields 3 fully specified out of 7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes a destination (Lisbon, Portugal), transportation type (Budget Airline, Economy Class), an accommodation (Adventure Lodge), and three activities: Hiking Expedition in Sintra-Cascais Natural Park (maps to Hiking Expedition), Full-day Yoga Retreat (maps to Yoga Retreat), and Street Art Tour. Using the ground-truth ratings: Lisbon, Portugal has rating 6; Budget Airlines Economy Class has rating 10; Adventure Lodge has rating 9; Hiking Expedition has rating 10; Yoga Retreat has rating 10; Street Art Tour has rating 8.
